intro:
Are you ready to discover your "true self"?
Just answer 4 choices — and your true nature will be exposed!
description:
"Your True Nature Test" is a psychological test game that diagnoses your "true nature" and "hidden personality" — just by answering questions with four choices.

That instinctive choice you made —
it might actually be revealing your deepest psychology!

· Sweet on the outside, but secretly calculating?
· A mastermind who pulls everyone's strings!?

"How is this so accurate?! It's scary…!"
"Had my friend play and their true nature came out — it was a blast!"

Perfect for enjoying solo at your own pace, or getting excited together with family, friends, or on stream — a party diagnosis game for everyone.

Ready to take a peek at your true self?

ーーーーーーーーーーーーーーー
TT supports gaming content creators.
No permission from TT is required to stream or create gameplay content, whether for personal or commercial use.
